name: Phase 3 Consumer - Uninstall vLLM
description: Uninstall vLLM and clean pip cache

tasks.name: Uninstall vLLM
commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'pip uninstall -y vllm || true'

tasks.name: Clean pip Cache
tasks.description: Clean pip cache to ensure fresh install

tasks.name: Verify Uninstallation
commands: sudo -u ubuntu bash -c 'pip show vllm' && echo '[WARNING] vLLM still installed' || echo '[OK] vLLM successfully uninstalled'
